rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `unipotent_radical_trivial`, `radical_trivial`, and `unipotentRadical_trivial'` are named as substantive radical-triviality assertions but have type `True`, a real naming-vs-type mismatch confirmed at lines 61, 66, and 68-69 of the diff; acting on this would make the API honest, whereas Review 1 incorrectly claims no overstatement exists.
